2605.22391.title: Epicure: Navigating the Emergent Geometry of Food Ingredient Embeddings
2605.22391.paper_summary: We present Epicure, a family of three sibling skip-gram ingredient embeddings retrained from scratch on a multilingual recipe corpus. We aggregate 4.14M recipes from 11 sources spanning seven languages, English, Chinese, Russian, Vietnamese, Spanish, Turkish, Indonesian, German, and Indian-English, and normalise the raw ingredient strings to 1,790 canonical entries via an LLM-augmented pipeline. A 203,508-edge ingredient-ingredient NPMI graph and an 80,019-edge typed FlavorDB ingredient-compound graph, 2,247 typed compound nodes across 15 categories, seed three Metapath2Vec variants that share architecture and hyperparameters and differ only in the random-walk schema: Cooc walks the co-occurrence graph only, Chem walks the typed compound metapaths only, and Core blends both via injected ingredient-ingredient walks at controlled mixing, placing each model at a distinct point on the chemistry-vs-recipe-context spectrum.
2605.22391.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 Epicure，一個由三個兄弟姐妹組成的 skip-gram 食材嵌入模型，從頭開始在多語言食譜語料庫上重新訓練。<lb/>我們從 11 個來源聚合了 4.14M 食譜，涵蓋七種語言：英語、中文、俄語、越南語、西班牙語、土耳其語、印尼語、德語和印度英語，並通過 LLM 增強的管道將原始食材字符串標準化為 1,790 個典範條目。<lb/>一個 203,508 邊的食材-食材 NPMI 圖和一個 80,019 邊的類型化 FlavorDB 食材-化合物圖，涵蓋 15 類的 2,247 個類型化化合物節點，為三個 Metapath2Vec 變體提供種子，這些變體共享架構和超參數，僅在隨機漫遊方案上有所不同：Cooc 僅在共現圖上漫遊，Chem 僅在類型化化合物的元路徑上漫遊，而 Core 通過在控制混合下注入的食材-食材漫遊來融合兩者，將每個模型放置在化學與食譜上下文光譜的不同點上。
2605.22391.author: Jakub Radzikowski et.al.
